prerequisites.name: production schema migration review
prerequisites.evidence: No production migration review was authorized.

prerequisites.name: RLS review
prerequisites.evidence: L policies are non-production evidence only.

prerequisites.name: source seed reconciliation
prerequisites.evidence: Only the authorized L project was reconciled.

prerequisites.name: backfill plan
prerequisites.evidence: No production backfill plan has been approved.

prerequisites.name: canary cohort
prerequisites.evidence: The M cohort is a non-production operating cohort.

prerequisites.name: rollback authority
prerequisites.evidence: Production rollback authority is not granted.

prerequisites.name: monitoring and alerting
prerequisites.evidence: Repository evidence exists, but production alert delivery is not configured.

prerequisites.name: operator ownership
prerequisites.evidence: Production release and incident roles require explicit designation.

prerequisites.name: incident response
prerequisites.evidence: The M runbook is non-production only.

prerequisites.name: public projection reconciliation
prerequisites.evidence: Preview rows remain hidden and production parity is unproven.

prerequisites.name: numeric route preservation
prerequisites.evidence: L and M fail-closed preview evidence preserves hidden numeric routes.

prerequisites.name: security and secrets
prerequisites.evidence: No secret is committed or printed by the M workflow.

prerequisites.name: cost and capacity
prerequisites.evidence: Two bounded cycles do not establish production capacity.

prerequisites.name: source parser and attachment risks
prerequisites.evidence: cau_002 transport, cau_008 zero-match, and attachment extraction remain unresolved.

prerequisites.name: full lint and build health
prerequisites.evidence: Four explicitly baselined React lifecycle lint errors remain.

prerequisites.name: external LLM governance
prerequisites.evidence: Provider evaluation and persistence remain prohibited and unevaluated.

next_phase_prerequisites: Authorize read-only production inventory and independently fingerprint the schema.
Approve migration, backup/export, source reconciliation, canary, rollback, and backfill plans with named owners.
Review RLS and public projection reconciliation against the production fingerprint.
Resolve or formally accept transport, zero-match, attachment, monitoring, capacity, and frontend lifecycle risks.
